Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: people by gender or sex [300157227], people (agents) [300024979], People (hierarchy name) [300024978], Agents Facet [300264089]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: hominins by sex or age [300310197], Hominidae (family) [300265709], Hominoidea (superfamily) [300266095], Primates (order) [300310320], Mammalia (class) [300265707], Vertebrata (subphylum) [300265720], Chordata (phylum) [300266513], Animalia (kingdom) [300249395], Eukaryota (domain) [300265677], living organisms (entities) [300390503], Living Organisms (hierarchy name) [300265673], Agents Facet [300264089]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Refers to female human beings from young adulthood through old age.
Se refiere a los seres humanos femeninos desde la adultez joven hasta la ancianidad.
Verwijst naar vrouwelijke personen vanaf jonge volwassenheid tot gevorderde leeftijd.
從成年早期到老年的女性。
Refere-se a seres humanos do sexo feminino desde a idade adulta jovem até a velhice.
Quimanextia macehualli cihuatl, cihuatl tlen chicauhtoc azta quemman eliya piltenantzin.

Source.Source_ID: 2000054707/中央研究院中英雙語知識本體詞網
